expected.title: Markdown - Wikipedia
must_not_contain: Navigation Main page Contents Current events
Random article About Wikipedia Contact us

notes: Wikipedia has <main> but wraps it in enormous navigation chrome (main menu, sidebar, footer, language list, references, external links). Selector chain hits <main>. Chrome stripping removes the sidebars and top nav — validated by must_not_contain. Confidence should be high due to long word count and low link density in the article body.
